JIANGXIAOMOD-RUINANCE.title: Endurance
JIANGXIAOMOD-RUINANCE.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
[blue]Passive Star Skill[/blue].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain the [gold]Endurance[/gold] power.
JIANGXIAOMOD-QING_MANG.title: Green Glow
JIANGXIAOMOD-QING_MANG.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
[blue]Attack[/blue].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage (scales with Quality).
Target loses {M} [gold]Strength[/gold] (scales with Quality).
Damage is doubled if you have a Melee Passive; 
Damage is x5 if the target has [blue]Artifact[/blue].
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRIKE_JIANG_XIAO.title: Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-DEFEND_JIANG_XIAO.title: Defend
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING.title: Blessing
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
Heal an ally for {HealAmount:diff()} HP.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ENEMY_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Enemy
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ENEMY_TOKEN.descri: Heal an enemy for {HealAmount:diff()} HP and [gold]Stun[/gold] them.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ALLY_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Ally
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ALL_ENEMY_TOKEN.de: Heal all enemies for {HealAmount:diff()} HP and [gold]Stun[/gold] them.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_SELF_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Self
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
Apply [gold]Seal Bearer[/gold] to an ally.
When damaged, receive continuous healing; the medical light of the guiding bell.
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN.title: Seal Bearer
JIANGXIAOMOD-ZHONG_LING.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
Cast medical light to heal random targets {Magic:diff()} times, restoring {Heal:diff()} HP each time. Prioritizes allies with the [gold]Seal Bearer[/gold] power.
JIANGXIAOMOD-ZHONG_LING.title: Bell
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN.title: Dawn
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
Apply [gold]Yearning Halo[/gold] to all allies with [gold]Dawn[/gold].
If none, apply to all units.
Currently provides {M}% Lifesteal.
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING.title: Yearning Halo
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT.title: Retrograde Light
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT.descriptio: Choose: Average HP with an [gold]Enemy[/gold] or an [gold]Ally[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ENEMY.desc: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose an enemy; average your HP with theirs.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ALLY.title: Retrograde Light: Ally
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ALLY.descr: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose an ally; average your HP with theirs.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
When attacked, there is a {MVar:diff()}% chance to apply a random debuff to the attacker.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT.title: Resentment
JIANGXIAOMOD-SPACE_GAP.title: Void Gap
JIANGXIAOMOD-SPACE_GAP.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
Gain {M:diff()} stacks of [blue]Intangible[/blue].
At [red]Diamond Quality[/red], also apply 1 stack of [blue]Intangible[/blue] to an ally.
JIANGXIAOMOD-ABUNDANT_STAR.title: Abundant Star Power
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_CONCEAL.title: Star Concealment
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_CONCEAL.description:
Choose an ally to gain {E:diff()} [blue]Energy[/blue].
At [red]Diamond Quality[/red], affects all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SHADOW_OF_VOID.title: Ruins of Calamity Shadow
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRENGTHEN_TOKEN.title: Strengthen
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRENGTHEN_TOKEN.descriptio: Choose a card in your deck to Upgrade.
JIANGXIAOMOD-REST_TOKEN.description: Restore 20% HP, as if at a Rest Site.
JIANGXIAOMOD-REST_TOKEN.title: Rest
JIANGXIAOMOD-SECONDARY_FACE.title: Sub-Aspect
JIANGXIAOMOD-SECONDARY_FACE.description: Choose 1 card in hand; add {M:diff()} copies of it to your hand. Copies cost 0 and have [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW.title: Tear of Sorrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
Give {M:diff()} stacks of [gold]Tear of Sorrow[/gold] to all units.
(If Quality is [red]Platinum[/red] or higher, only applies to all enemies).
JIANGXIAOMOD-CLEAN_TEARS.title: Purifying Tears
JIANGXIAOMOD-CLEAN_TEARS.description:
[blue]Star Skill[/blue].
Remove [blue]Status[/blue] & [blue]Curse[/blue] cards from yourself and allies; {M:diff()} card(s) each from Draw Pile/Hand/Discard Pile.
JIANGXIAOMOD-UNARMED_STRIKE.title: Unarmed Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-UNARMED_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw {M:diff()} card(s).
(Scales with [gold]Unarmed Combat Rank[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE1.title: Xia Blade Style 1: Cross-Cut Love
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE1.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
(Scales with [gold]Xia Style Blade Rank[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE2.title: Xia Blade Style 2: Vertical Love
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE2.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
(Scales with [gold]Xia Style Blade Rank[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE3.title: Xia Blade Style 3: Rising Love
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE3.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
(Scales with [gold]Xia Style Blade Rank[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE_TRUE.title: True Xia Blade: Housecleaning
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE_TRUE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
(Scales with [gold]Xia Style Blade Rank[/gold]).
Damage is x4 if you have Xia Blade Styles 1, 2, and 3.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARROW.title: Basic Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {M:diff()} card(s) with [blue]Archery Mastery[/blue].
(Scales with [gold]Archery Mastery Rank[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_ARROW.title: Star Power Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_ARROW.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
(Scales with [gold]Archery Mastery Rank[/gold] & [gold]Star Power Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHERING_ARROW.title: Withering Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHERING_ARROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {M:diff()} [blue]Poison[/blue] and {D:diff()} [blue]Calamity[/blue].
(Scales with [gold]Archery Mastery Rank[/gold]).
